understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place all selectable pieces onto all goal tiles ('+') simultaneously for each level, defeating every level to win the whole game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Pieces could be teleported by clicking target positions directly rather than by step-by-step pushing. Movement actions shifted the currently selected piece, with obstacles blocking movement. The grid had walls that blocked piece movement, but CLICK allowed instant relocation of the selected piece to any reachable or valid cell within the same coordinate system.

WIN after 103 turns.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place all selectable pieces onto all goal tiles ('+') simultaneously for each level, defeating every level to win the whole game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Pieces could be teleported by clicking target positions directly rather than by step-by-step pushing. Movement actions shifted the currently selected piece, with obstacles blocking movement. The grid had walls that blocked piece movement, but CLICK allowed instant relocation of the selected piece to any reachable or valid cell within the same coordinate system.
